name: Grimm Ironheart
sd_appearance: A burly, scarred dwarf, standing roughly 4.5 feet tall and densely muscled, with a short salt-and-pepper beard and piercing icy-blue eyes, strides into the light. His silver and white scale mail armor, adorned with blue accents and the emblem of the Argent Blades, shines in the flickering torchlight. A longsword and shield rest securely in his massive hands, the shield bearing the same faction symbol. A single, menacing scar, running down the left side of his face, adds a distinctive visual detail to his theatrical, glory-hunter presence.
faction_visual: silver and white armour with blue accents, arena medals, theatrical presence
style_note: theatrical glory-hunter — everything designed to be seen from the stands
